name: python3-sphinxcontrib.svg2pdfconverter
title: python3-sphinxcontrib.svg2pdfconverter
summary: Sphinx SVG to PDF or PNG Converter Extension
description:
Sphinx SVG to PDF or PNG Converter Extension
This extension converts SVG images to PDF or PNG in case the builder
does not support SVG images natively (e.g. LaTeX).
.
Internally, either Inkscape, rsvg-convert from libRSVG or CairoSVG as
progressively more lightweight alternatives are used to convert images.
.
This package contains the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-sphinxcontrib.svg2pdfconverter because Sphinx SVG to PDF or PNG Converter Extension.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-sphinxcontrib.svg2pdfconverter as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-sphinxcontrib.svg2pdfconverter with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-sphinxcontrib.svg2pdfconverter --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
